Ranks.Description: <rt.warning>{PrimaryStatIncrease}</> <rt.primarystat>Strength</> / <rt.primarystat>Intellect</> / <rt.primarystat>Agility</> while you are above <rt.heal>{HealthThreshold} health</>.

<rt.warning>+{StaminaBonus}</> <rt.primarystat>Stamina</>
<rt.warning>+{SecondaryBonus}</> <rt.primarystat>Strength</> / <rt.primarystat>Intellect</> / <rt.primarystat>Agility</>
You heal for <rt.combat-heal>{HealPercent}</> of your <rt.meikoability2>Maximum Health</> every <rt.meikoability1>{Seconds} seconds</> while in combat.
<rt.warning>{PercentIncrease}</> <rt.primarystat>Stamina</>
While <rt.greyitalic>in combat with a boss</> your <rt.primarystat>Damage</>, <rt.primarystat>Healing</>, and <rt.primarystat>Absorption</> is increased by <rt.warning>{DamageIncrease}</>.

<rt.warning>{PrimaryStatIncrease}</> <rt.primarystat>Strength</> / <rt.primarystat>Intellect</> / <rt.primarystat>Agility</> while you are above <rt.heal>{HealthThreshold} health</>.

(Replaces <rt.absorb>Might of the Minotaur</>)

<rt.warning>+{StaminaBonus}</> <rt.primarystat>Stamina</>
<rt.warning>+{SecondaryBonus}</> <rt.primarystat>Strength</> / <rt.primarystat>Intellect</> / <rt.primarystat>Agility</>

(Replaces <rt.absorb>Champion's Heart</>)

You heal for <rt.combat-heal>{HealPercent}</> of your <rt.meikoability2>Maximum Health</> every <rt.meikoability1>{Seconds} seconds</> while in combat.

(Replaces <rt.absorb>Unyielding Vitality</>)

<rt.warning>{PercentIncrease}</> <rt.primarystat>Stamina</>

(Replaces <rt.absorb>Titan's Blood</>)

While <rt.greyitalic>in combat with a boss</> your <rt.primarystat>Damage</>, <rt.primarystat>Healing</>, and <rt.primarystat>Absorption</> is increased by <rt.warning>{DamageIncrease}</>.

(Replaces <rt.absorb>Blessing of the Conqueror</>)

Your <rt.primarystat>Damage</> and <rt.primarystat>Healing</> effects on characters with more than <rt.heal>{HealthThreshold} health</> have <rt.warning>{CritChanceBonus}</> <rt.tertiarystat>Critical Strike</> chance.

<rt.warning>+{StaminaBonus}</> <rt.primarystat>Stamina</>
<rt.warning>+{CritBonus}</> <rt.tertiarystat>Critical Strike</>

Each time <rt.greyitalic>an enemy that you dealt damage to dies</>, you gain <rt.absorb>Reaper's Reprieve</>, healing you for <rt.combat-heal>{HealPercent}</> of your <rt.meikoability2>Maximum Health</> over <rt.effect>{Duration} seconds</>.
<rt.warning>{CritChanceBonus}</> <rt.tertiarystat>Critical Strike</> chance.
Your Critical Strikes do <rt.warning>{CritPowerBonus}</> more <rt.primarystat>Damage</> and <rt.primarystat>Healing</>.

Your <rt.primarystat>Damage</> and <rt.primarystat>Healing</> effects on characters with more than <rt.heal>{HealthThreshold} health</> have <rt.warning>{CritChanceBonus}</> <rt.tertiarystat>Critical Strike</> chance.

(Replaces <rt.absorb>Sealed Fate</>)

<rt.warning>+{StaminaBonus}</> <rt.primarystat>Stamina</>
<rt.warning>+{CritBonus}</> <rt.tertiarystat>Critical Strike</>

(Replaces <rt.absorb>Berserker's Zeal</>)

Each time <rt.greyitalic>an enemy that you dealt damage to dies</>, you gain <rt.absorb>Reaper's Reprieve - II</>, healing you for <rt.combat-heal>{HealPercent}</> of your <rt.meikoability2>Maximum Health</> over <rt.effect>{Duration} seconds</>.

(Replaces <rt.absorb>Reaper's Reprieve</>)

<rt.warning>{CritChanceBonus}</> <rt.tertiarystat>Critical Strike</> chance.

(Replaces <rt.absorb>Killer Instinct</>)

Your Critical Strikes do <rt.warning>{CritPowerBonus}</> more <rt.primarystat>Damage</> and <rt.primarystat>Healing</>.

(Replaces <rt.absorb>Blessing of the Deathdealer</>)
<rt.warning>{HasteBonus}</> <rt.tertiarystat>Haste</> for <rt.effect>{Duration} seconds</> each time you deal damage to or heal a character that has <rt.debuff>{HealthThreshold} or less health</>.

<rt.warning>+{StaminaBonus}</> <rt.primarystat>Stamina</>
<rt.warning>+{HasteBonus}</> <rt.tertiarystat>Haste</>

When you are <rt.debuff>below {HealthThreshold} health</> you are instantly healed for <rt.combat-heal>{HealPercent}</> of your <rt.meikoability2>Maximum Health</>. 

<rt.greyitalic>This effect can only occur once every {Cooldown} seconds</>.
<rt.warning>{HasteBonus}</> <rt.tertiarystat>Haste</>
You retain <rt.warning>{HasteBonus}</> <rt.tertiarystat>Haste</> from <rt.absorb>Spirit of Heroism</> while it is not active.

<rt.warning>{HasteBonus}</> <rt.tertiarystat>Haste</> for <rt.effect>{Duration} seconds</> each time you deal damage to or heal a character that has <rt.debuff>{HealthThreshold} or less health</>.

(Replaces <rt.absorb>Adrenaline Rush</>)

<rt.warning>+{HasteBonus}</> <rt.tertiarystat>Haste</>

(Replaces <rt.absorb>Thief's Alacrity</>)

When you are <rt.debuff>below {HealthThreshold} health</> you are instantly healed for <rt.combat-heal>{HealPercent}</> of your <rt.meikoability2>Maximum Health</>.

<rt.greyitalic>This effect can only occur once every {Cooldown} seconds</>.

(Replaces <rt.absorb>Rogue's Resurgence</>)

<rt.warning>{HasteBonus}</> <rt.tertiarystat>Haste</>

(Replaces <rt.absorb>Feline Grace</>)

(Replaces <rt.absorb>Blessing of the Virtuoso</>)
<rt.warning>{ExpertiseBonus}</> <rt.tertiarystat>Expertise</> for <rt.effect>{Duration} seconds</> when <rt.greyitalic>dealing damage to any enemy for the first time</>.

<rt.warning>+{StaminaBonus}</> <rt.primarystat>Stamina</>
<rt.warning>+{ExpertiseBonus}</> <rt.tertiarystat>Expertise</>

Every <rt.effect>{Cooldown} seconds</>, you gain a shield that absorbs damage equal to <rt.warning>{ShieldPercent}</> of your <rt.meikoability2>Maximum Health</>. The shield lasts for <rt.effect>{ShieldDuration} seconds</>.
<rt.warning>{ExpertiseBonus}</> <rt.tertiarystat>Expertise</>
<rt.warning>{CooldownReduction}</> <rt.bold>Ability Cooldown</> reduction

<rt.warning>+{ExpertiseBonus}</> <rt.tertiarystat>Expertise</>

(Replaces <rt.absorb>Vanguard's Resolve</>)

(Replaces <rt.absorb>Tactician's Accumen</>)

(Replaces <rt.absorb>Blessing of the Commander</>)

<rt.warning>+{SpiritBonus}</> <rt.tertiarystat>Spirit</>

The cost of your <rt.bold>Spirit Ability</> is reduced by <rt.warning>{CostReduction}</>.

The duration of <rt.absorb>Spirit of Heroism</> is increased by <rt.effect>{DurationBonus} seconds</>.

Your maximum <rt.bold>Spirit Points</> is increased by <rt.mana>{SpiritPointsBonus}</>.

(Replaces <rt.absorb>Blessing of the Prophet</>)

Each time <rt.greyitalic>an enemy you are in combat with is defeated</>, you gain <rt.warning>{StatBonus}</> <rt.tertiarystat>Critical Strike</>, <rt.tertiarystat>Haste</>, <rt.tertiarystat>Expertise</>, and <rt.tertiarystat>Spirit</> for <rt.effect>{Duration} seconds</>, stacking up to <rt.bold>{MaxStacks} times</>.

When the duration of <rt.absorb>Harmonious Soul</> expires, you lose <rt.bold>{StackLoss}</> stack.

<rt.warning>+{ArmorBonus}</> <rt.primarystat>Armor</>
<rt.warning>+{PrimaryStatBonus}</> <rt.primarystat>Strength</> / <rt.primarystat>Intellect</> / <rt.primarystat>Agility</>

<rt.greyitalic>This effect cannot occur more than once every {Cooldown} seconds</>.
<rt.warning>{PrimaryStatBonus}</> <rt.primarystat>Strength</> / <rt.primarystat>Intellect</> / <rt.primarystat>Agility</>
Your <rt.bold>Relic cooldowns</> are reduced by <rt.warning>{CooldownReduction}</>.

(Replaces <rt.absorb>Harmonious Soul</>)

<rt.greyitalic>This effect cannot occur more than once every {Cooldown} seconds</>.

232.Name: Death's Grasp
232.Description:
+4% Spirit
+10% damage to Low Health enemies.

239.Name: Draconic Might
239.Description: Your critical strikes have a chance (0.9 PPM) to increase your Main Stat by 18% for 14 seconds.

240.Name: Torment of Bael'Aurum
240.Description:
+4% Main Stat

When dipping below 20% Health, you are instantly healed for 35% of your maximum health. This can occur once every 180 seconds.

245.Name: Drakheim's Absolution
245.Description: Your Spirit Ability grants you Drakheim's Absolution, increasing your Main Stat by 20% for 20 seconds.

246.Name: Dark Prophecy
246.Description: Your abilities have a chance (0.8 PPM) to increase your Haste by 25% for 20 seconds.

629.Name: Seal of the Heskyr
629.Description: Your Gem Power is increased by 25%.

BasicToIncreasedPower.Name: The Intrepid
BasicToIncreasedPower.Description: The power of your next [POWER] ability is increased by X%, stacking up to 5 times.

CurrentSpiritToBuff.Name: The Philosopher
CurrentSpiritToBuff.Description: Your Haste, Expertise and Critical Strike chance are increased by {increase}.

PowerIncreasedCritChanceAndPower.Name: The Sinister
PowerIncreasedCritChanceAndPower.Description: Your [CORE] abilities have {CritStrike} Critical Strike Power and {CritChance} increased Critical Chance.

DamageReductionOrMoveSpeed.Name: The Stag
DamageReductionOrMoveSpeed.Description: Your Movement Speed is increased by {increase} and your Damage Reduction is increased by {increase2}.

MagicDamageReductionBuff.Name: The Dune
MagicDamageReductionBuff.Description: Your Magic Damage Reduction is increased by {increase}.
